prompt:
Subject:
Residual heat of the ring

Person/Expression:
woman in her 20s. Bright ivory-beige toned fair skin with a smooth texture and subtle pink glow. Not excessive beauty retouching; sweat and light reflect naturally on the cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, collarbone, and back. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long thin eyelashes, natural tear bags, light brown soft eyebrows, and a sheer pink-beige gloss lip. Clear catchlights in the eyes. Hair is a loose updo in dark brown, with thin see-through bangs and wispy hairs around the face. Turning to look at the camera with a relaxed smile.

Clothing/Pose:
White fitted sports bra, navy blue sports shorts with white trim, and white hand wraps. Forearms resting on the white ropes of a boxing ring, leaning slightly forward. One hand near the chin with fingers slightly curled. A diagonal back-view posture showing the line from shoulders to back. Toned core, a healthy and mature sports portrait.

Background/Light:
Dark indoor boxing gym. White, red, and blue ring ropes, with a blue corner post on the right side of the screen. Background gym equipment and text blurred with a shallow depth of field, with no legible logos or brand names. Main light is a strong white gym light from the upper right, creating strong highlights on the sweat on shoulders, cheeks, and back. Soft shadows on the left and downward. Background is low exposure, making the subject stand out.

Composition/Camera:
4:5 aspect ratio. Close medium shot. Subject is center-left, face near the top-left, blue corner post in the back-right. Camera at waist to chest height, slightly close distance. Diagonal back-view composition. Focus on face and shoulders, background naturally blurred. Slight compression of about 70mm, halfway between sports photography and portraiture.

Texture/Style:
Realistic Japanese-style sports portrait photography. Natural depiction of sweat beads, fine skin texture, fabric stretch, hand wrap fibers, and the vinyl texture of the ring ropes. Conveys the humidity of a dark gym, strong light reflections, and the heat after training. Not overly sharp, with a magazine-like texture that suppresses an edited feel.

Negative:
Young-looking face, unnatural face or gaze, extra or missing fingers, fused fingers, poor contact with hand wraps, broken joints, floating sensation not resting weight on ropes, unnatural gravity, excessive shine from sweat, plastic-like skin, excessive beauty retouching, legible text, logos, watermarks, unwanted persons, broken background.
